7 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_UTILS_IINDEX_MANAGER_H
8 #define ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_UTILS_IINDEX_MANAGER_H
9 
10 
11 #include <arcane/Item.h>
12 #include <arcane/utils/ObjectImpl.h>
13 #include <arcane/utils/Array.h>
14 #include <arcane/utils/AutoRef.h>
15 #include <arcane/IItemFamily.h>
16 #include <arcane/utils/FatalErrorException.h>
17 #include <arcane/utils/ITraceMng.h>
18 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
19 #include <arcane/ItemTypes.h>
20 
21 #ifdef USE_ARCANE_V3
22 #include <alien/utils/SafeConstArrayView.h>
23 #else
24 #include <ALIEN/Utils/SafeConstArrayView.h>
25 #endif

27 #include <vector>

29 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
30 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

32 #define BEGIN_ALIEN_NAMESPACE namespace Alien {
33 #define END_ALIEN_NAMESPACE }
34 #endif
35 
36 BEGIN_ALIEN_NAMESPACE
37 
38 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
39 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
40 
49 class IIndexManager {
50 public:
52  class IAbstractFamily {
53  public:
54  class Item {
55  public:
56  Item(Int64 uniqueId, Integer owner) : m_unique_id(uniqueId), m_owner(owner) { }
57  public:
58  Int64 uniqueId() const { return m_unique_id; }
59  Integer owner() const { return m_owner; }
60  private:
61  Int64 m_unique_id;
62  Integer m_owner;
63  };
64 
65  public:
66  virtual ~IAbstractFamily() { }
67 
68  public:
70  virtual IAbstractFamily * clone() const = 0;
71 
72  public:
74  virtual Int32 maxLocalId() const = 0;
76  virtual void uniqueIdToLocalId(Arcane::Int32ArrayView localIds, Arcane::Int64ConstArrayView uniqueIds) const = 0;
78  virtual Item item(Int32 localId) const = 0;
80  virtual SafeConstArrayView<Integer> owners(Arcane::Int32ConstArrayView localIds) const = 0;
82  virtual SafeConstArrayView<Int64> uids(Arcane::Int32ConstArrayView localIds) const = 0;
84  virtual SafeConstArrayView<Int32> allLocalIds() const = 0;
85  };
86 
87 protected:
89  class EntryImpl
90  {
91  public:
93  virtual ~EntryImpl() { }
95  virtual Arcane::ConstArrayView<Integer> getOwnIndexes() const = 0;
97  virtual Arcane::ConstArrayView<Integer> getAllIndexes() const = 0;
99  virtual Arcane::ConstArrayView<Integer> getOwnLocalIds() const = 0;
101  virtual Arcane::ConstArrayView<Integer> getAllLocalIds() const = 0;
103  virtual String getName() const = 0;
105  virtual Integer getKind() const = 0;
107  virtual const IAbstractFamily & getFamily() const = 0;
109  virtual void addTag(const String &tagname, const String &tagvalue) = 0;
111  virtual void removeTag(const String &tagname) = 0;
113  virtual bool hasTag(const String &tagname) = 0;
115  virtual String tagValue(const String & tagname) = 0;
117  virtual IIndexManager * manager() const = 0;
118  };
119 
120 public:
122 
125  class Entry
126  {
127  protected:
129  EntryImpl * m_impl;
130  public:
132  Entry() : m_impl(NULL) { }
133 
135  Entry(const Entry & en) : m_impl(en.m_impl) { }
136 
138  Entry(EntryImpl * impl) : m_impl(impl) { }
139 
141  Entry & operator=(const Entry & en) {
142  if (this != &en)
143  m_impl = en.m_impl;
144  return *this;
145  }
146 
148  EntryImpl * internal() const { return m_impl; }
149 
151  bool null() const { return m_impl == NULL; }
152 
153  void nullify() {
154  m_impl = NULL ;
155  }
156 
158  ConstArrayView<Integer> getOwnIndexes() const { return m_impl->getOwnIndexes(); }
159 
161  ConstArrayView<Integer> getAllIndexes() const { return m_impl->getAllIndexes(); }
162 
164  ConstArrayView<Integer> getOwnLocalIds() const { return m_impl->getOwnLocalIds(); }
165 
167  ConstArrayView<Integer> getAllLocalIds() const { return m_impl->getAllLocalIds(); }
168 
170  String getName() const { return m_impl->getName(); }
171 
173  Integer getKind() const { return m_impl->getKind(); }
174 
176  const IAbstractFamily & getFamily() const { return m_impl->getFamily(); }
177 
179  void addTag(const String &tagname, const String &tagvalue) { return m_impl->addTag(tagname,tagvalue); }
181 
183  void removeTag(const String &tagname) { return m_impl->removeTag(tagname); }
184 
186  bool hasTag(const String &tagname) { return m_impl->hasTag(tagname); }
187 
189  String tagValue(const String & tagname) { return m_impl->tagValue(tagname); }
191 
193  IIndexManager * manager() const { return m_impl->manager(); }
194  };
195 
196 
198  class EntryEnumeratorImpl :
199  public Arcane::ObjectImpl {
200  public:
201  virtual void moveNext() = 0;
202  virtual bool hasNext() const = 0;
203  virtual EntryImpl * get() const = 0;
204  };
205 
206 
208 
209  class EntryEnumerator {
210  protected:
211  Arcane::AutoRefT<EntryEnumeratorImpl> m_impl;
212  public:
214  EntryEnumerator(const EntryEnumerator & e) : m_impl(e.m_impl) { }
216  EntryEnumerator(IIndexManager * manager) : m_impl(manager->enumerateEntry().m_impl) { }
218  EntryEnumerator(EntryEnumeratorImpl * impl) : m_impl(impl) { }
220  void operator++() { m_impl->moveNext(); }
222  bool hasNext() const { return m_impl->hasNext(); }
224  Entry operator*() const { return m_impl->get(); }
226  EntryImpl * operator->() const { return m_impl->get(); }
228  Integer count() const
229  {
230  Integer my_size = 0;
231  for(EntryEnumerator i = *this; i.hasNext(); ++i) ++my_size;
232  return my_size;
233  }
234  };
235 
236 
237  public:
239  IIndexManager() { }
240 
242  virtual ~IIndexManager() { }
243 
245  virtual bool isPrepared() const = 0 ;
246 
248 
249  virtual void init() = 0;
250 
252  virtual void prepare() = 0;
253 
255  virtual void setTraceMng(Arcane::ITraceMng * traceMng) = 0;
256 
258 
259  virtual void stats(Integer & globalSize,
260  Integer & minLocalIndex,
261  Integer & localSize) const = 0;
262 
264 
265  virtual Integer globalSize() const = 0;
266 
268 
269  virtual Integer minLocalIndex() const = 0;
270 
272 
273  virtual Integer localSize() const = 0;
274 
276  virtual EntryEnumerator enumerateEntry() const = 0;
277 
279  virtual Entry getEntry(const String name) const = 0;
280 
281  typedef Entry ScalarIndexSet;
282  typedef SharedArray<ScalarIndexSet> VectorIndexSet;
283 
285  virtual ScalarIndexSet buildScalarIndexSet(const String name,Arcane::IItemFamily * item_family) = 0;
286  virtual void defineIndex(ScalarIndexSet& set , const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup) = 0;
287  virtual ScalarIndexSet buildScalarIndexSet(const String name, const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup) = 0;
288 
290  virtual ScalarIndexSet buildScalarIndexSet(const String name, const Arcane::IntegerConstArrayView localIds, const IAbstractFamily & family) = 0;
291 
293  virtual ScalarIndexSet buildScalarIndexSet(const String name, const IAbstractFamily & family) = 0;
294 
296 
297  virtual VectorIndexSet buildVectorIndexSet(const String name, const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup, const Integer n) = 0;
298 
300 
301  virtual VectorIndexSet buildVectorIndexSet(const String name, const Arcane::IntegerConstArrayView localIds, const IAbstractFamily & family, const Integer n) = 0;
302 
304 
305  virtual VectorIndexSet buildVectorIndexSet(const String name, const IAbstractFamily & family, const Integer n) = 0;
306 
308 
309  virtual void removeIndex(const ScalarIndexSet & entry, const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup) = 0;
310  virtual void removeIndex(const VectorIndexSet & entry, Integer i, const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup)
311  {
312  removeIndex(entry[i],itemGroup) ;
313  }
314 
315  virtual Integer getIndex(const Entry & entry, const Arcane::Item & item) const = 0 ;
316 
318  virtual void getIndex(const ScalarIndexSet & entry, const Arcane::ItemVectorView & items, ArrayView<Integer> indexes) const = 0;
319 
321  virtual Arcane::IntegerSharedArray getIndexes(const ScalarIndexSet & entry) const = 0;
322 
324  virtual Arcane::IntegerSharedArray2 getIndexes(const VectorIndexSet & entry) const = 0;
325 
327  virtual Arcane::IParallelMng * parallelMng() const = 0;
328 
330  virtual void setMaxNullIndexOpt(bool flag) = 0 ;
331 
333  virtual Integer nullIndex() const = 0 ;
334 
335 
336 public:
338 
341  virtual void keepAlive(const IAbstractFamily * family) = 0;
342 };
343
